## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu onboarding discussion and strategic planning for Dave Capone's role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dave to focus on understanding company processes, programmatic SEO, and e-commerce opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Emphasis on structuring onboarding, formalizing processes, and systematizing growth for clients](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Dave will be managing two "pods" of team members, including Jan, Mariana, Deya, and Fatima](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Key areas for improvement: proving ROI, showing metrics/signals to clients, and automating reporting](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Structuring

  - [40 current clients with rapid growth necessitating formalized processes](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Need to structure learning and onboarding for new team members](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Focus on improving workflows and establishing knowledge baselines](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Challenge: Transitioning from early "magic" to scalable, structured approaches](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Client Growth Strategies

  - [Some accounts not seeing expected growth levels](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Goal: Systematize growth and guide clients through long-term success](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Importance of proactive feedback seeking and relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Opportunity to learn from successful accounts and apply insights broadly](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### E-commerce Opportunities

  - [Significant potential in e-commerce, especially content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Previous experience with product catalog enrichment for major platforms (e.g., Meta, Walmart)](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Possible webinar in early April to showcase learnings from accounts like Fanatics](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Opportunity to launch dedicated e-commerce work stream](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Dave's Role and Responsibilities

  - [Initially managing two "pods": Jan/Deya and Mariana/Fatima](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Focus on programmatic SEO and reviewing client growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Encouraged to bring fresh perspective and expertise to improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Potential to develop new work streams, e.g., e-commerce focus](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Emphasis on deep understanding and exploration in first few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Access to recorded calls, kickoffs, and sales meetings for context](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Suggestion to map out ideal processes from an unbiased perspective](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Key stakeholders to connect with: Kyle (go-to person), Jan, and Mariana](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Tools and Resources

  - [Slack: Join EXT- and internal- channels for each client account](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Notion: Familiarize with SOP section, handbook, and account spaces](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Encouraged to document gaps in processes or explanations](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to schedule time with Kyle for in-depth onboarding and context](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [Connect with key stakeholders and peers for introductory meetings](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Dive into client accounts, particularly those needing programmatic SEO approach (e.g., goodcall.com)](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Explore Slack channels and Notion documentation to get up to speed](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Provide feedback on onboarding process and identify areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/K3QwWUSf-o7sLV6etWZv-4os9rokDcVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
